The '''Sandstorm Shipping Concern''' was a shipping and transport agency based in [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

This company was operated by [[Qes Dollis]], from his offices in the [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] city of Mos Eisley, on behalf of the owner, [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]].

{{Company-stub}}
